definitions: Flat cakes, often sweet, made with flour, sugar, and eggs, and sometimes fruit or nuts.
A type of traditional Catalan pastry, similar to a flatbread or focaccia, which can be sweet or savory.
Informal term for drugs, especially cocaine.
examples: Vaig comprar coques de Sant Joan.
Les coques amb sucre són les meves preferides.
No et fiquis en el món de les coques.
